title: zeltnera maryanniana
intro: Zeltnera maryanniana, also known as Mary's mist maidenhair, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Zeltnera maryanniana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of asthma, colds, and flu, as well as its antimicrobial properties that may help fight off infections. In herbal preparations, Zeltnera maryanniana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory issues.
